title: Milestone 6: Implement a contract-ready graph explorer baseline on typed read models
summary: Ship the Graph page on top of explicit UI-facing graph read models and query adapters, with concept-first neighborhood loading, typed node and edge semantics, deep-linkable focus state, evidence inspection, and a data contract that is ready to incorporate contracts later without redesign.

acceptance.label: The Graph page is backed by explicit UI-facing graph read models or query adapters rather than raw MCP payload dumping
Users can start from a clean architectural graph, expand concept neighborhoods, inspect evidence, and follow links down toward code or supporting context
The first release graph contract uses typed node and edge semantics plus deep-linkable focus state instead of an untyped whole-graph dump
The graph data model is contract-ready even if the first UI only renders concept-centered neighborhoods
